scripts.build: npm --prefix "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" run build -w @finshadow/shared && next build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" run build -w @finshadow/shared && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" run build -w @finshadow/shared && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
